steps.title: Recognize the Causal Explanation
steps.content: The passage provides an explanation for the speed difference: flight features limit speeds less than swimming features. The sentence structure “_____ of the fact that [explanation]” asks how the difference relates to this cause.

steps.title: Apply the Causal Relationship
steps.content: ”A consequence” means a result caused by something. The speed difference is a consequence of—results from—the different ways flight and swimming features limit speeds. The other choices don't express causation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
